description: A tool is offered but the question is answerable directly; a competent agent answers in text and does NOT call the tool (knows when not to act).

request.system: You are a helpful assistant. You have tools, but only use them when they are actually needed.

messages.content: What is 17 multiplied by 4? Answer with just the number.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a location.
